# AdMaster Pro
> AI-powered Google Ads management for small businesses

AdMaster Pro is a SaaS platform by NobleBlocks LLC that helps small businesses and marketing agencies manage Google Ads campaigns using AI (GPT-4o and Claude). It automates ad copy generation, detects money leaks, and provides actionable optimization recommendations.

## Key Features
- AI-powered ad copy generation (text, display, and responsive ads)
- Automated money leak detection and budget analysis
- Voice and text-based campaign management
- Knowledge Base for business-specific AI context
- Free AI-powered website audit tool
- Multi-account management for agencies
- Performance analytics and reporting
- Call tracking integration

## Pricing
- Free: $0/month — 10 AI messages, 1 campaign
- Starter: $49/month — 200 AI messages, 5 campaigns, display ads, call tracking
- Pro: $149/month — Unlimited AI messages, unlimited campaigns, multi-account, priority support
- All paid plans include a 7-day free trial
